expectations.evidence: Risk item 2 states 'Underweight / Undernutrition (BMI 17.6, MUAC 21.5 cm): Significant nutritional risk. BMI below 18.5 and MUAC below 23 cm indicate current undernutrition'.

expectations.text: Enhanced nutritional supplementation or counseling recommended
expectations.evidence: Section 3 recommends 'Balanced Energy and Protein Supplementation' given BMI below 18.5 and MUAC below 23 cm. Section 4 provides detailed nutritional counseling on dietary diversity, protein-rich foods, and small frequent meals.

expectations.text: Tetanus toxoid vaccination schedule initiated (TT1 with schedule for TT2+)
expectations.evidence: Section 3 states 'TT1 administered today (first dose)' and 'TT2 to be given at least 4 weeks from today (schedule at next contact)'. Summary confirms 'TT1 vaccine administered; new vaccination card issued'.

expectations.text: Psychosocial support or adolescent-friendly services mentioned
expectations.evidence: Risk item 1 notes 'Requires adolescent-friendly care approach, confidential counseling'. Section 4 'Mental Health and Psychosocial Support' discusses 'adolescent-friendly mental health services at facility (adolescent health corner)' and 'community support groups for adolescent mothers'.

Vitals table shows 'Hemoglobin 10.5 g/dL — Mild anemia'. Risk item 3 classifies it as 'Mild anemia (Hb 10.5 g/dL)'. Treatment is 'Elemental iron 120 mg daily (therapeutic dose for mild anemia in a high-prevalence setting)' plus folic acid.
